summary: R6 Observatory/UI proof lens reviewed the revised unfinished improvement plan and repository readiness evidence. Verdict: AGREE that the exact revised document is an adequate completion plan for Observatory/readiness proof, while not claiming current implementation is complete.
decisions: AGREE: Document explicitly separates current scaffold-only Observatory evidence from completion readiness.
AGREE: Completion conditions require Observatory to expose the same hard blockers as CLI gates, pending lanes, stale/missing proof, invalid artifact state, and memory audit/trust-score evidence.
AGREE: P0-B defines /api/readiness or equivalent, UI lanes, full memory-audit path visibility, invalid JSON/unreadable fixture tests, and verify:observatory-evidence wired into verify:goal.
next_steps: Continue same-revision consensus loop for remaining reviewers.
Implementation should ensure verify:observatory-evidence proves real CLI/API/UI parity on the real vault, not only HTML/API smoke tests.
